$description: Klartext spacing tokens — source of truth. All padding, margin and gap values must use these named values.
$usage: Use the $value directly (e.g. spacing.md = 12 → padding: '12px'). Never use arbitrary pixel values not listed here.

xs.$description: Tight: icon padding, chip inner gap

sm.$description: Small: button vertical padding, compact gaps

md.$description: Medium: button horizontal padding, default inner padding

lg.$description: Large: card padding, section inner spacing

xl.$description: XL: page-level horizontal padding, nav padding
